scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-r from-white via-white to-white/60
scales.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-white

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind defaults, but use generous spacing (py-24 or py-32 for sections)

surface_strategies.glass_card: bg-[#0A0F1C]/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] rounded-2xl p-6
surface_strategies.glass_header: bg-[#0A0F1C]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10 sticky top-0 z-50
surface_strategies.neon_border_glow: relative before:absolute before:inset-0 before:rounded-2xl before:border before:border-transparent before:bg-gradient-to-r before:from-[#00F5FF] before:to-[#7B61FF] before:[-webkit-mask-image:linear-gradient(white,white)] before:[-webkit-mask-composite:xor] before:opacity-20 hover:before:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-300
surface_strategies.upload_zone: border-2 border-dashed border-[#7B61FF]/50 hover:border-[#00F5FF] bg-[#7B61FF]/5 hover:bg-[#00F5FF]/5 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-12 group cursor-pointer

Button.primary: bg-[#00F5FF] text-[#0A0F1C] font-semibold hover:bg-[#00F5FF]/90 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,245,255,0.4)] transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-4
Button.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#7B61FF] text-[#7B61FF] font-semibold hover:bg-[#7B61FF]/10 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(123,97,255,0.2)] transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-4
Button.destructive: bg-transparent border border-[#FF4D6D] text-[#FF4D6D] hover:bg-[#FF4D6D]/10 rounded-full

Charts.instructions: Use custom Tooltip with glassmorphism styling. Axis lines should be subtle (stroke='rgba(255,255,255,0.1)'). Use neon cyan (#00F5FF) and purple (#7B61FF) for data series. If showing bias disparity, highlight the gap in red (#FF4D6D).

Upload.instructions: Implement dropzone using `react-dropzone` or standard inputs hidden behind a stylised div. Animate the upload icon (e.g. bounce or pulse). Include a distinct text button 'Or use sample dataset'.

Score_Widget.instructions: Display a large number (0-100). If >80, color cyan. If 50-80, color purple. If <50, color red (#FF4D6D) and pulse.

animations.page_load: Framer Motion staggered fade-in up (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1).
animations.hover_effects: Buttons and cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and increase shadow/glow opacity.
animations.loading_spinner: A circular SVG spinner with a gradient stroke from #00F5FF to #7B61FF, spinning continuously.

hero_bg.description: Abstract neon lines digital landscape. Place behind the hero section with a heavy radial mask or dark overlay (bg-[#0A0F1C]/80) so text is highly readable.

about_bg.description: Abstract geometric pattern with glowing purple and green lines. Use for the About section background with glassmorphism overlay.

team_photo.description: Hackathon team working on laptops. Use in the footer or about section to represent the creators.

main_agent_instructions: Build a React + Vite + Tailwind + Shadcn web app. Use Framer Motion for enter animations. The UI must strictly follow the dark #0A0F1C background with Neon Cyan and Purple accents. Implement a glassmorphism theme using the specified surface_strategies. The dashboard must use a Bento Grid layout as specified in layout_and_spacing. DO NOT use generic gray borders; use white/10. Use Montserrat for headings and Inter for body text.
